qualification_reason: The lead has a clear landing page need, urgent timeline, and strong buying intent, but the budget is not mentioned.
main_need: Landing page for an online course
hidden_need: A conversion-focused page to present and sell the online course more clearly
next_best_action: Clarify the available budget, course details, launch timeline, and whether the lead already has landing page content prepared.
follow_up_message: Halo Kak Andi, bisa Kak. Untuk landing page kelas online, aku perlu tahu dulu beberapa hal supaya arahnya tepat: kelasnya tentang apa, target pesertanya siapa, dan apakah materi copywriting atau kontennya sudah siap? Boleh juga info kisaran budget dan target launch-nya kapan supaya aku bisa bantu arahkan opsi yang paling masuk akal.
owner_action_required: Review the draft message and manually clarify budget, course details, content readiness, and launch timeline.
crm_note: Online course lead needs a landing page urgently but has not mentioned budget. Clarify budget, course topic, target audience, content readiness, and launch date.
